text:
[The guardian is excused attendance at this hearing provided they have given full instructions to their advocate.]

Joinder of parties

[Name] is joined as a party to the proceedings.

[Name] is joined as a party to the proceedings limited for the following purposes: [insert].

The local authority shall by 4.00pm on [date] serve [name] with a copy of the bundle.

The bundle served on [name] shall [exclude the following documents:] / [be redacted to remove:]

[insert]

Next hearing(s)

There shall be a [FCMH] / [IRH/EFH] / [ground rules hearing] / [pre-trial directions hearing] / [finding of fact hearing] / [final hearing] at the Family Court sitting at [court name] at [time] on [date] before [name of judge] allowing [hours/days]. The parties and advocates shall attend 1 hour prior to the listed time for pre-hearing discussions.

There shall be the following further hearings:

A [FCMH] / [IRH/EFH] / [ground rules hearing] / [pre-trial directions hearing] / [finding of fact hearing] / [final hearing] at the Family Court sitting at [court name] at [time] on [date] before [name of judge] allowing [hours/days].

[Etc.]

The parties and advocates shall attend each hearing 1 hour prior to the listed time for pre-hearing discussions.

The following hearings remain listed:

A [FCMH] / [IRH/EFH] / [ground rules hearing] / [pre-trial directions hearing] / [finding of fact hearing] / [final hearing] at the Family Court sitting at [court name] at [time] on [date] before [name of judge] allowing [hours/days].

[Etc.]

The parties and advocates shall attend each hearing 1 hour prior to the listed time for pre-hearing discussions.

If the parents fail to attend the [IRH/EFH] [or] [final] hearing without good reason the court may make final orders including care [and placement] orders in their absence.

The parents must attend all hearings and their reasonable travel expenses to and from court shall be a disbursement on their public funding certificates.
